hero.headline: 7kg Gone in 30 Days. Guaranteed.
hero.subheadline: A done-for-you transformation protocol for your mom — dietitian, food psychologist, daily tracking, and a system that works even after she goes home.
hero.description: 2-week immersive camp in Stepanavan + 2-week guided home phase. Full accountability system. Double guarantee.
hero.trustLine: Only 4 spots per cohort · Pre-program medical screening · Double guarantee included

problem.headline: You Already Know Her Health Is Getting Worse
problem.paragraph1: You've tried talking to her. You've sent her articles. You've suggested walking. She says 'yes balas' and nothing changes. It's not a motivation problem — it's an environment problem. Her daily routine, her kitchen, her habits — everything around her reinforces the same patterns.
problem.paragraph2: You can't fix this with advice. She needs a controlled environment, professional guidance, and a system that continues working when she goes home. That's what we built.

situations.text: Blood pressure, blood sugar, or weight trending in the wrong direction
Same diet for 20 years — nothing you say changes it
She won't invest in herself — classic Armenian mom guilt
Past diets failed because there was no system, just willpower

system.headline: How the Protocol Works
system.intro: This isn't a wellness vacation. It's a structured 30-day system with two phases, daily data collection, and continuous professional oversight. Maximum 4 participants per cohort — everyone gets direct attention.

phases.name: Phase 1: Camp (Days 1-14)
phases.description: Controlled environment. All meals prepared by our team — zero carbs, Armenian-friendly food she'll actually enjoy. Daily yoga. Nature walks (7-10K steps/day). 1-on-1 sessions with a food psychologist to rewire her relationship with eating. Cooking workshops so she learns to replicate meals at home. She builds friendships with 3 other women her age going through the same thing.
phases.keyMetrics: Daily weigh-ins · Step tracking · Meal logging · Psychology sessions logged

phases.name: Phase 2: Home (Days 15-30)
phases.description: She goes home with printed meal plans, grocery lists, and recipes. But she's not on her own. Every meal is photographed and posted to the group chat BEFORE she eats — our dietitian reviews in real time. Step count screenshot posted daily by 9pm. Weekly video check-in with the full cohort. Her buddy from camp texts her daily. If she misses a check-in, we notice within hours.
phases.keyMetrics: Meal photos reviewed daily · Step count verified · Weekly weigh-in on camera · Buddy check-ins logged

reporting.headline: You Get Weekly Reports
reporting.description: Every week you receive a progress update: weight trend, step count totals, meal compliance rate, and dietitian notes. You'll know exactly how she's doing without having to ask.

story.headline: Built By Someone Who Needed It First
story.paragraph1: I lost 20kg using this methodology. Not through willpower or a crash diet — through understanding why I was eating wrong and systematically changing it. Food psychology + structured nutrition + daily accountability.
story.paragraph2: After keeping the weight off, I put together a team — a licensed dietitian and a food psychologist — to package this into a repeatable program. The camp in Stepanavan is the delivery mechanism. The system is what produces the result.
story.boldStatement: I'm not a fitness influencer. I'm someone who solved this problem for myself and built a team to solve it for others.

howItWorks.headline: What You Actually Have To Do

steps.title: Leave Your Info
steps.description: Fill in your name and phone number. We'll call you within 24 hours to answer questions, confirm dates, and walk you through everything.

steps.title: Get Her There
steps.description: Use our 'How to gift this to your mom' script — it handles the guilt objection. We handle travel logistics and pre-program medical screening.

steps.title: Monitor Progress
steps.description: Weekly reports delivered to you. Real-time visibility into her steps, meals, and weight trend. You don't have to do anything — just watch it work.

howItWorks.bottomLine: Your total time investment: ~30 minutes. One form, one conversation with your mom. We handle the other 29 days and 23.5 hours.

forMom.headline: Մամա, Սա Քեզ Համար Է
forMom.intro: This section is written for her. Screenshot it. Send it on WhatsApp. Or just hand her your phone.
forMom.letter:
Dear Mom,

This isn't a diet. This isn't a gym. This is 2 weeks in beautiful Stepanavan with 3 other women your age, eating delicious food that happens to be healthy, walking in nature, doing gentle yoga, and learning from professionals who will help you understand your body.

You'll have a food psychologist to talk to. A dietitian who plans every meal. Cooking workshops where you'll learn recipes your whole family will love. And you'll make new friends — women just like you, going through the same experience.

There's a spa day. There are sightseeing trips. There's mountain air and no kitchen to clean.

When you come home, you won't be alone. You'll have a buddy from camp who texts you every day. A group chat full of women cheering you on. And a meal plan stuck to your fridge.

You've spent 30 years taking care of everyone else.

Let someone take care of you for 30 days.

All you have to do is show up.

highlights.text: 2 weeks in Stepanavan — fresh air, nature walks, mountain views
3 delicious meals a day — Armenian food you'll love, prepared for you
Only 4 women per group — personal attention, real friendships
Yoga, spa day, sightseeing — this is rest, not boot camp
After camp — daily support, buddy system, free yoga classes in Yerevan

forMom.closingLine: Your child already paid for this because they love you. All you have to do is say yes.

valueStack.priceContext: Less than ֏20,000/day for a full team of professionals, accommodation, meals, and a system that produces measurable results.

guarantee.headline: Two Guarantees. Your Risk Is Near Zero.

guarantees.name: 5-Day Try-It Guarantee
guarantees.description: She arrives and starts the program. If within 5 days she feels it's not for her — she goes home and you get 84% of your money back. We keep 16% to cover the accommodation and meals for those 5 days. Fair for everyone.

guarantees.name: 7kg Or We Keep Working
guarantees.description: She completes the 30-day protocol, posts every check-in, follows the meal plan — and doesn't lose 7kg? We continue coaching her for free until she hits it. Conditions: full protocol compliance.

guarantee.summary: 5-day 84% refund if she doesn't like it. 7kg or free continuation until she hits it. Your downside is capped at 5 days of accommodation costs.

results.headline: What The Data Should Show After 30 Days
results.note: Based on the protocol design and founder's personal results. Clinical cohort data coming after first group completes.

metrics.detail: Alumni community + free yoga in Yerevan

testimonials.headline: Cohort Results
testimonials.comingSoon: First cohort is forming now. Measurable results — weight, blood work, compliance rates — will be published here after completion.
testimonials.placeholder: We will publish: average kg lost, blood panel improvements, completion rate, and video testimonials from both participants and the developers who gifted the program.

items.question: What if she has health issues or takes medication?
items.answer: Pre-program medical screening is mandatory. Our dietitian reviews all medications and conditions. If something makes the program unsafe for her, we reject the application and refund you. Health first, always.

items.question: She's going to say 'don't waste your money on me.'
items.answer: We know. That's why we created a script for this exact conversation. It reframes the gift as a health investment — one hospital stay for blood pressure or diabetes costs more than this entire program. We'll send you the exact words to use.

items.question: How do I know she won't cheat on the diet at home?
items.answer: Every meal is photographed and posted BEFORE eating. Our dietitian reviews in real time. Step counts are verified daily. Weekly video weigh-ins with the whole group. A buddy from camp texting her daily. And you get a weekly compliance report. The system has more monitoring than most production environments.

items.question: What does she eat? She's picky.
items.answer: Armenian food — tolma, khorovats, soups, stews — adapted to be low-carb. Not salads and protein shakes. Real food she already likes, prepared differently. She learns to cook it herself during camp workshops.

items.question: Will she gain it back?
items.answer: The food psychology component exists specifically to prevent this. She's not white-knuckling through a diet — she's changing how she understands food. Plus: maintenance blueprint, alumni community, and 2 weeks of free yoga in Yerevan to bridge the gap.

items.question: What if the other women are younger or fitter?
items.answer: Cohorts are matched by age and fitness level. Only 4 women per group, all in similar life stages — typically age 45-60, similar starting point. The exercise is walking, not CrossFit. She'll be with peers.

items.question: Is Stepanavan safe?
items.answer: Medical screening before arrival. On-call health protocols during camp. Stepanavan has medical facilities nearby. You receive daily updates on her status.

items.question: Can I pay in installments?
items.answer: Yes. Contact us to set up a payment plan.

items.question: Only 4 people? When's the next cohort?
items.answer: We run small cohorts intentionally — 4 women maximum so everyone gets direct 1-on-1 time with the dietitian and psychologist. Spots fill fast. Leave your info and we'll tell you the next available date.

items.question: Why 84% refund and not 100% for the 5-day guarantee?
items.answer: Because we've already spent real money housing and feeding her for those 5 days. The 16% covers actual costs incurred. We think that's fair — you're not paying for a service that didn't work, you're covering meals and a bed she used.

items.question: What's the time commitment for me?
items.answer: About 30 minutes total. One form, one phone call with us, one conversation with your mom. After that, you just read weekly reports. We handle everything else.

form.disclaimer: We'll call once. No spam. No automated messages.
